nasb.text: Therefore thus says the Lord, “Behold, I am about to give this city into the hand of the Chaldeans and into the hand of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon, and he will take it.

esv.text: Therefore, thus says the Lord: Behold, I am giving this city into the hands of the Chaldeans and into the hand of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon, and he shall capture it.

cnv.text: 因此耶和華這樣說：‘看哪！我必把這城交在迦勒底人的手中，交在巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒的手中，他必攻取這城。

ccb.text: 看啊，我要把这城交在巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒和他率领的迦勒底人手中，让他们攻取这城。这是耶和华说的。
